editor.defaultContent:
# Welcome to the Editor

This is a feature-rich rich text editor that supports various formats and features.

## Rich Text Editing

Supports **bold**, *italic*, <u>underline</u>, ~~strikethrough~~ and `inline code`.

![Image Placeholder](/placeholder.jpeg)

### Code Block

Code blocks support syntax highlighting.

```typescript
const greeting = 'Hello, World!'
console.log(greeting)
```

### List

1. Ordered list
2. Auto numbering

- Unordered list
  - Supports nesting
  - Multi-level nesting

- [ ] Task list
- [x] Completed task

### Table

Insert and edit tables with row and column operations.

| Feature | Description | Status |
| ------- | ----------- | ------ |
| Table | Full table support | ✅ |
| Markdown | Content serialization | ✅ |

---

## Features

### Toolbar

Select text to see the bubble toolbar, the top fixed toolbar provides quick access to common operations.

### Drag Handle

Use the drag handle on the left to reorder, copy, delete or convert block types.

### Slash Command

Type `/` to quickly insert headings, lists, code blocks, tables, images, etc.

### Image Upload

Supports custom image upload nodes.

### Emoji

Use `:` to add emoji 🚀
